mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( id,number, status, user_id, address_book_id, consignee,phone,address, amount,pay_amount, pay_method, order_time,delivery_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{id},#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{consignee},#{phone},#{address}, #{amount},#{payAmount}, #{payMethod}, #{orderTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{remark} )
